testcase.name: testGetUserIntegration

error.message: Failed to load ApplicationContext for [WebMergedContextConfiguration@25de8898 testClass = com.example.UserIntegrationTest, locations = [], classes = [com.example.JunitDemoApplication], contextInitializerClasses = [], activeProfiles = [], propertySourceDescriptors = [], propertySourceProperties = ["org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper=true"], contextCustomizers = [[ImportsContextCustomizer@bfb93cf key = [org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.MockMvcWebDriverAutoConfiguration, org.springframework.boot.test.context.filter.ExcludeFilterContextCustomizer@8ed9cf, org.springframework.boot.test.json.DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizerFactory$DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizer@540dbda9, org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockitoContextCustomizer@289e84d6, org.springframework.boot.test.web.client.TestRestTemplateContextCustomizer@626e0c86, org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestAnnotation@8359ea53], resourceBasePath = "src/main/webapp", contextLoader = org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootContextLoader, parent = null]

This problem should never occur for javac-compiled classes. If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : Eclipse Adoptium JVM vendor version : 25.0.3+9-LTS JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25.0.3+9-LTS JVM info : mixed mode, sharing OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
